title: menezesiella ouricanense
intro: Menezesiella ouricanense is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Ouricani vine or Ouricani tree. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Menezesiella ouricanense include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
